message.content:
NO CARDS. The image contains a light beige background with two text sections:  
1. "AI-Powered" (bold, dark gray) with the subtitle "Free AI features for non-designers" (lighter gray) and "3 TOOLS" (light gray, right-aligned).  
2. "Utilities" (bold, dark gray) with the subtitle "Quick everyday helpers" (lighter gray) and "1 TOOL" (light gray, right-aligned).  
No cards, icons, buttons, or grid of tool cards are visible—only text and blank space.
